items.title: Developer Platform Incident Stabilization Sprint
items.description: A focused KTLO initiative to reduce critical production defects, tighten incident response loops, and remove the highest-severity reliability failures affecting Platform Engineering operations.

items.title: Golden Path Debt Retirement
items.description: A KTLO initiative to reduce operational drag by refactoring brittle integrations, simplifying recovery paths, and removing legacy technical debt that slows change in Platform Engineering.

items.title: Runtime Patch Compliance Cycle
items.description: A KTLO initiative to keep the Platform Engineering stack within security patch SLAs by upgrading vulnerable dependencies, rotating outdated components, and closing remediation gaps.
